data.title: Port dev-onboarding/design-onboarding offer step to onboarding SKILL.md
data.description:
## What happened

test-project-setup-onboarding-step.sh asserts a Step 7 block (dev-onboarding/design-onboarding offer with 4-option AskUserQuestion, artifact detection, skip behavior) in onboarding/SKILL.md. This content was in the original project-setup/SKILL.md but was never ported when the skill was merged into /dso:onboarding.

## Impact

8 test assertions fail in test-project-setup-onboarding-step.sh. These are tracked as RED zone tests via .test-index marker [test_step7_exists] and are tolerated by the test gate.

## Fix needed

Add the onboarding integration offer block to onboarding SKILL.md Phase 3 so test-project-setup-onboarding-step.sh passes. Remove the [test_step7_exists] RED marker from .test-index afterward.
